name: User Profile Repair
description: Exports the list of local user profiles to a text file for review. Useful for diagnosing corrupted profile issues, orphaned profiles, or when a user cannot log in. Run as administrator.
author: sentinel-desktop

parameters.name: username
parameters.label: Username
parameters.description: The Windows username whose profile needs repair (for reference in the report)

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.label: Output Path
parameters.description: Path to save the profile list report

params.args: /c wmic UserAccount list brief > "{{output_path}}" && echo PROFILE_LIST_EXPORTED

steps.description: Export local user account list to file
steps.name: Export local user account list to file

steps.description: Append user profile directory listing to report
steps.name: Append user profile directory listing to report

steps.description: Open the profile report in Notepad for review
steps.name: Open the profile report in Notepad for review
